feedback.text: This Digital Fairness Act seems wonderful, and could really help us in giving ownership of our video games back to the consumer. These days, before even installing a game, a consumer has to read a EULA, and come to terms that they barely own the game, they own a license that can be taken away whenever, for any reason. It's less owning, and more like borrowing for an extremely long time. While i have not been affected by any game shutdown, I know several people that have. I do not want them to lose out on products bought legally via verified digital vendors.
